title: Insufficient parameters for SharePoint OAuth2 callback
symptom: When attempting to connect to SharePoint, the error 'Insufficient parameters for OAuth2 callback' is displayed, indicating a failure in the OAuth2 authentication process.
not_this_if: Using a self-hosted version of n8n
root_cause: The error occurs because the n8n application is not installed by default on the Microsoft tenant. Without this installation, the necessary permissions for OAuth2 authentication are not granted, leading to the insufficient parameters error.
fix_steps: Ensure that the n8n.io app is installed on the Microsoft tenant.
Verify that the app has the necessary permissions configured in Microsoft Entra ID.
Retry the OAuth2 connection setup in n8n.
agent_instruction: Install the n8n.io app on the Microsoft tenant and ensure it has the required permissions.
